subject: 444 Madison
body:
Tommy M asked if I knew of any space that he might be able to  lease.  He was 
looking for a small space.  I think he said 2,500  ft.  If you decide not to 
take 444 Madison, maybe this space could be  useful for him.  Let me know what 
you think.

body_html:
Tommy M asked if I knew of any space that he might be able to lease.  He was looking for a small space.  I think he said 2,500 ft.  If you decide not to take 444 Madison, maybe this space could be useful for him.  Let me know what you think.
